action.reasoning: Observation: Current heuristic (from test_full_episode.py output) achieves safe_follow_steps~41 avg (max 85/500), nav_seek_success=0.0, avg_dist~4.7m — loses the moving humanoid quickly. Test confirmed positive angular velocity reduces negative angle (sign OK). Config: max_steps=500, threshold=500 safe steps in [1,2)m with facing. Analysis: Proportional controller too simplistic for random-walking target; literature heuristic (map+shortest-path follower) reaches ~0.5 follow rate. Decision: Improve heuristic in test_full_episode.py + predict.py with better gains, deadzone logic, backup on too-close, use humanoid_detector as bonus, tune for more following time. Run improved test (3 eps), then full predict+submit_eval to get realistic score/time before longer runs. Keep model.pt dummy for contract.
